title: Praxis Annual Meeting
abstract: Presented a paper titled Making Sense of the World Amidst Death: Learnings from the Covid-19 Pandemic at the American Anthropological Association Annual Meeting in Tampa. The presentation drew on research from her book, The Final Farewell: Understanding the Last Rites and Rituals of India’s Major Faiths, HarperCollins India, examining how communities in India navigated loss, mourning, and ritual transformation during the pandemic.
